name: memorydetective-plugin
description: iOS leak hunting and performance investigation. Bundles the memorydetective MCP server with a /perf-investigate skill. One-command install for Claude Code.

plugins.name: memorydetective
plugins.description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation: 41 MCP tools, 36-pattern cycle classifier with Swift fixTemplate snippets. v1.17 reliability pass (strtobool env truthy parsing, verifyFix whitelist exact/substring/regex match modes, recordViaInstrumentsApp catches traces saved outside watchDir, fault-tolerant inspectTrace fallback, configurable countAlive noise filter). v1.16 recordViaInstrumentsApp unblocks macOS 26.x trace recording. v1.15 schema-coverage trio (analyzeMemoryFootprint, analyzeEnergyImpact, analyzeLeakTimeline). v1.14 analyzeNetworkActivity + unified supportStatus[]. v1.13 summarizeTrace + /summarize-trace MCP prompt for single-call cross-schema trace synthesis. End-to-end abandoned-memory chain (analyzeAbandonedMemory + countAlive + findRetainers + verifyFix all surface reference-tree data), analyzeHangs auto cross-schema correlation, inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs reference-tree, detectLeaksInXCTest per-test CI gate with HTML reports, cleanupTraces ops tool, single-call build+boot+launch fixing the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression, replayScenario + captureScenarioState verify-fix loop, compareTracesByPattern for CI gating, /perf-investigate skill. CLI human-output surfaces abandoned-memory suspects by default. Reads .memgraph + .trace files; classifies retain cycles; bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP.
